title: Mildly Smoky Norwegian Fish Biryani
description: A spicy and flaky Norwegian dish featuring rice vinegar and smoke, perfect for the monsoon season, this ayurvedic-sattvic-friendly recipe is a twist on traditional biryani.
instructions: Heat the ghee in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the cumin seeds and let them sizzle for a few seconds.
Add the onion, garlic, and ginger, and saute until the onion is translucent.
Add the smoked paprika and cook for 1 minute.
Add the Norwegian cod and cook until it is flaky and cooked through.
Add the basmati rice and stir to combine.
Add the rice vinegar and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low and cover the pan with a tight-fitting lid.
Simmer for 10 minutes or until the rice is cooked and the liquid is absorbed.
Fluff the biryani with a fork and serve hot.
